= Contents =
  - [[#PYTHON|PYTHON]]
      - [[#PYTHON#virtualenv|virtualenv]]
        - [[#PYTHON#virtualenv#create venv|create venv]]
        - [[#PYTHON#virtualenv#install requirements|install requirements]]
        - [[#PYTHON#virtualenv#activate pyenv|activate pyenv]]
        - [[#PYTHON#virtualenv#create pyenv|create pyenv]]
        - [[#PYTHON#virtualenv#install version of Python|install version of Python]]
      - [[#PYTHON#tips & tricks|tips & tricks]]
        - [[#PYTHON#tips & tricks#web server|web server]]

= PYTHON =

=== mock ===
To patch *class* attribute or method::
{{{class="brush: python"
  @mock.patch.object(Class, 'attribute/method')
  def test(self, mocked_attribute/method):
    mocked_method.side_effect=...
    mocked_method.return_value=...
}}}
:: also, mocked object/method can be specified
{{{class="brush: python"
  def fake_method(self):
    ...
    
  @mock.patch.object(Class, 'attribute/method', faked_method)
  def test(self):
    mocked_method.side_effect=...
    mocked_method.return_value=...
}}}


To patch 
    

=== virtualenv ===
			
==== create venv ====
{{{
  python -m venv $venv
}}}
==== install requirements ====
{{{
  pip install -r requirements.txt
}}}
==== activate pyenv ====
{{{
  pyenv activate $venv_name
}}}
==== create pyenv ====
{{{
  pyenv virtualenv $python_version $venv_name
}}}
==== install version of Python ====
{{{
  pyenv install $version
}}}
                
                
                
                
=== tips & tricks ===

==== web server ====
{{{
  python -m http.server --cgi 8000
}}}
